Cliff Climber Hardriggan.name: 峭壁攀登者哈德里根 Cliff Climber Hardriggan
Cliff Climber Hardriggan.description:
你的双手和双脚非常适合攀爬。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.09PurtIanNUPfNRq]{Combat Climber} 专长，作为奖励专长。你的立足十分稳固，因此你在攀爬小于90度的斜坡时不需要用手。此外，如果你在进行 Athletics 检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{Climb} 时掷骰结果为成功，你改为获得大成功或大失败。

Your hands and feet are well- suited for climbing. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.09PurtIanNUPfNRq]{Combat Climber} feat as a bonus feat. Your footing is so sure that you don't need to use your hands to climb inclines less than 90 degrees. Additionally, if you roll a success on an Athletics check to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.pprgrYQ1QnIDGZiy]{Climb}, you get a critical success instead.

Greathorn Hardriggan.name: 巨角哈德里根 Greathorn Hardriggan
Greathorn Hardriggan.description:
你的角比其他硬里根人更大、更锋利。你的角徒手攻击获得多用P特征，此外还保留其其他特征。你获得你角徒手攻击的重击专精效果。如果你本来就会获得你角的重击专精效果，那么每次你对敌人造成重击时，你可以选择使用徒手组的重击专精效果或刀刃组的重击专精效果。

Your horns are larger and sharper than those of other hardriggans. Your horn unarmed attack gains the versatile P trait, in addition to its other traits. You gain the critical specialization effect of your horn unarmed attack. If you would already gain your horn's critical specialization effect, you can choose each time you critically hit a foe whether to use the brawling group's critical specialization effect or the knife group's critical specialization effect.

Depthfarer Chochori.name: 深渊远行者·乔科里 Depthfarer Chochori
Depthfarer Chochori.description:
你是探索深海海沟黑暗的乔科里开拓者的后裔，因而获得了即使不使用光也能看见的视力。你获得黑暗视觉。

You are descended from chochori trailblazers who explored the darkness of deep ocean trenches, gaining eyesight capable of seeing even without the use of light. You gain darkvision.

Scuttle Bacco.name: 疾行獾獾 Scuttle Bacco
Scuttle Bacco.description:
你看起来像一只章鱼，有六根触手作为腿，两根作为手臂。你可能重视自由，并珍视自己在陆地或水中生活的能力。你获得15尺的游泳速度和两栖（特征）。和所有具有两栖（特征）的生物一样，你既能呼吸水也能呼吸空气。

You resemble an octopus with six tentacles for legs and two for arms. You may value freedom and cherish your ability to live on land or in water. You gain a swim Speed of 15 feet and the amphibious trait. Like all creatures with the amphibious trait, you can breathe both water and air.

Osmic Bannog.name: 奥斯米克·班诺格 Osmic Bannog
Osmic Bannog.description:
你拥有极其敏锐的嗅觉。你获得不精确嗅觉，射程为30尺。这意味着你可以使用你的嗅觉来确定一个生物的确切位置。若你处于该生物的下风处，GM通常会将射程加倍；若你处于该生物的上风处，GM通常会将射程减半。

You have an incredibly keen sense of smell. You gain imprecise scent with a range of 30 feet. This means you can use your sense of smell to determine a creature's exact location. The GM will usually double the range if you're downwind from the creature or halve the range if you're upwind.

Landwalker Chochori.name: 踏地者 乔科乔里 Landwalker Chochori
Landwalker Chochori.description:
你已经适应了自己，以便更容易将更多的生命花在陆地上，而不是在水下。你没有水合能力，使你在陆地上和在水下一样轻松呼吸，持续无限长的时间。你的陆地速度为25英尺，但你的游泳速度只有15英尺。

You’ve adapted yourself to make it easier to spend more of your life on land, rather than underwater. You don’t have the hydration ability, allowing you to breathe as easily on land as underwater, for an unlimited amount of time. Your land Speed is 25 feet, but your swim Speed is only 15 feet.

Ironbeak G'Mayun.name: 铁喙·格梅云 Ironbeak G'Mayun
Ironbeak G'Mayun.description:
与你的同类相比，你的喙格外灵活，使你在战斗中比其他g’mayun更擅长刺穿血肉与骨骼。你拥有一次喙的徒手攻击，可造成1d6穿刺伤害。你的喙属于搏斗武器组，并具有灵巧和徒手特征。

Your beak is especially flexible compared to the norm, making you more capable than other g’mayuns at piercing flesh and bones during battle. You have a beak unarmed attack that deals 1d6 piercing damage. Your beak is in the brawling weapon group and has the finesse and unarmed traits.

Fourth-of-Five, the Mountain.name: 五中第四，群山 Fourth-of-Five, the Mountain
Fourth-of-Five, the Mountain.description:
你带有五分之四、行走之山、第一泰坦、巨兽的印记。不同于你的同族，你缺少两栖（特征）（因此也就没有在水中呼吸的能力），但你仍然可以每次屏住吐息长达1小时，并且你的体型为中型，而非小型。然而，你在运动技能上为受训，并且你从你的族裔获得10点生命值而非6点。如果你已经在运动技能上为受训，你改为在你选择的另一项技能上为受训。

You bear the mark of the Fourth-of-Five, the Mountain-that-Walks, the First Titan, the Behemoth. Unlike your kinfolk, you lack the amphibious trait (and thus the ability to breathe water), though you can still hold your breath for up to 1 hour at a time, and you are Medium sized, rather than small. However, you are trained in Athletics, and you gain 10 Hit Points from your ancestry instead of 6. If you were already trained in Athletics, you become trained in another skill of your choice.

Second-of-Five, the Venomous.name: 五号之二，剧毒者 Second-of-Five, the Venomous
Second-of-Five, the Venomous.description:
你的古老始祖是“五之第二”、 “无尽毒液”、 “杀人毒素”、 “最后一滴”。你可以向敌人吐出酸性唾液，造成可怕的后果。你获得一次带有徒手特征的酸液唾吐徒手攻击，造成1d4点酸性伤害，且射程增量为10英尺。在大成功或大失败命中时，目标受到等同于武器伤害骰数量的持续酸性伤害。你的酸性唾液不会附加重击专精效果。

Your elder progenitor was the Second-of-Five, the Infinite Venom, the Poison-that-Kills, the Final Drop. You can spit your acidic saliva at an enemy, with dire consequences. You have an acid spit unarmed attack with the unarmed trait that deals 1d4 acid damage and has a range increment of 10 feet. On a critical hit, the target takes persistent acid damage equal to the number of weapon damage dice. Your acid spittle does not add critical specialization effects.

Shadebound Bannog.name: 影缚班诺格 Shadebound Bannog
Shadebound Bannog.description:
你或你的祖先曾居住在梦魇与阴影的领域中。你获得弱光视野。

You or your ancestors once resided in a realm of nightmares and shadows. You gain low-light vision.

Fervorsoul G'Mayun.name: 炽魂者吉玛云 Fervorsoul G'Mayun
Fervorsoul G'Mayun.description:
你的情绪变得狂野且失控，但其力量能帮助你影响他人的情绪。你在进行外交检定以 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象} 时，以及你为情绪效果进行的外交与威吓检定（例如 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{胁迫} 和 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{挫志}）时，获得+1环境加值。然而，你压倒性的情绪并不总是优势。你对抗情绪效果的豁免还会承受–1减值。

Your emotions run wild and out of control, but their strength can assist you in swaying the emotions of others. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} as well as Diplomacy, and Intimidation checks you make for emotion effects, such as @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.tHCqgwjtQtzNqVvd]{Coerce} and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.2u915NdUyQan6uKF]{Demoralize}. However, your overwhelming emotions are not always an advantage. You also take a –1 penalty to saving throws against emotion effects.

Ash Kragrak.name: 灰烬·克拉格拉克 Ash Kragrak
Ash Kragrak.description:
你的身体与心智都很灵活。你在杂技中为受训，或者如果你已经在杂技中为受训，则改为另一项技能的受训。此外，你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.3G8xUlgCjRmRJNfP]{Quick Squeeze} 技能专长作为加值专长。在休整模式期间，你重训得稍微更快，每当重训通常需要 1 周时，你只需 6 天。

Your body and mind are flexible. You are trained in Acrobatics, or in another skill if you were already trained in Acrobatics. Additionally, you gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.3G8xUlgCjRmRJNfP]{Quick Squeeze} skill feat as a bonus feat. During Downtime, you Retrain slightly faster, taking only 6 days for each week that Retraining would normally require.

Nighteyes G'Mayun.name: 夜眼·格玛云 Nighteyes G'Mayun
Nighteyes G'Mayun.description:
你看见视觉光谱之外色彩的能力得以扩展，使你在黑暗中也能像在光中一样轻松地看见。你获得黑暗视觉。

Your ability to see colors beyond the visual spectrum expands, allowing you to see in the dark just as easily as in light. You gain darkvision.

Kayman Bacco.name: 凯曼·巴科 Kayman Bacco
Kayman Bacco.description:
你的鳄鱼形态反映了你对生命的冷漠看法，你已因目睹的残酷而对痛苦麻木不仁。你获得等于你等级一半的精神抗力（最低为1），并在对抗情绪效果的豁免上获得+1环境加值。

Your crocodilian form reflects your cold view of life, inured to suffering by the cruelties you have witnessed. You gain mental resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1) and a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against emotion effects.

Loping Hardriggan.name: 大步行走的哈德里根 Loping Hardriggan
Loping Hardriggan.description:
你强壮的双腿能让你迅捷而自信地在地面上移动。你的速度增加5英尺。

Your muscular legs can carry you swiftly and confidently over the ground. Your speed increases by 5 feet.

Bloodsear Hardriggan.name: 血灼·哈德里根 Bloodsear Hardriggan
Bloodsear Hardriggan.description:
你出身于一个战士世家。无论你是否选择祖先那种暴力的生命，你的血液会迅速凝固，肌肉也容易结疤。你为结束持续流血伤害而进行的纯骰检定的DC从15降至10；在获得尤其恰当的协助后，则从10降至5。

You come from a line of warriors. Regardless of whether you choose the violent life of your ancestors, your blood clots quickly and your flesh scars with ease. Your DC on flat checks to end persistent bleed damage is reduced from 15 to 10, or from 10 to 5 after receiving especially appropriate assistance.

Willful Bannog.name: 任性班诺格 Willful Bannog
Willful Bannog.description:
你已习惯于以意志之力改变自身与周围环境。虽然你发现物质位面对你的想法遗憾地毫无反应，但你的心智已被广博的经历所淬炼。你获得等同于你等级一半的精神抗力（最低 1）。当你处于 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑（状态）}状态时，你用于从困惑中恢复并结束该状态的纯骰检定 DC 为 8，而非 DC 11。

You're accustomed to altering yourself and your surroundings through force of will. While you find the Material Plane unfortunately unresponsive to your thoughts, your mind is hardened by your vast experiences. You gain mental resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1). When you have the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} condition, your flat check to recover from your confusion and end the condition is DC 8 instead of DC 11.

First-of-Five, the Ironshell.name: 五中之首，铁壳 First-of-Five, the Ironshell
First-of-Five, the Ironshell.description:
在久远的年代里，你由“五者之首”“万肤之体”“永生者”“不死之物”塑造而成。你能在他人无法生存之处存活，毒素与瘟疫在你扭曲的器官中无法立足。你获得等同于你等级一半的毒素抗力（最低为1），并且你在对抗疾病与毒素的豁免上获得+1环境加值。

In ages past, you were formed of the First-of-Five, the All-Skin, the Everliving, That-Which-Cannot-Die. You can live where others cannot, with poisons and plagues failing to find purchase in your twisted organs. You gain resistance to poison equal to half your level (minimum 1), and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons.

Wisp-Eye Bannog.name: 鬼火之眼班诺格 Wisp-Eye Bannog
Wisp-Eye Bannog.description:
你对分辨现实与幻象之间的差异有着敏锐的眼力——这是你在梦境与清醒生活之间无缝切换所磨炼出的技能。你在对抗幻象的察觉检定与对抗幻象的意志豁免上均获得+1环境加值。

You have a keen eye for discerning the differences between reality and illusions—a skill honed from switching seamlessly between your dreaming and waking lives. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to both Perception checks against illusions and Will saves against illusions.

Wildfire Leshy.name: 野火莱西族 Wildfire Leshy
Wildfire Leshy.description:
着火是你的自然状态，仅仅擦过火焰并不足以伤害你。你获得等同于你等级一半的火抗力（最低1）。你也能更容易从着火状态中恢复。你用于移除持续火伤害的纯骰检定DC为10而非DC15；如果另一名生物使用特别合适的动作来帮助，则降至DC 5。

Being on fire is your natural state, and it takes more than a brush with flame to harm you. You gain fire resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1). You can also recover from being on fire more easily. Your flat check to remove persistent fire damage is DC 10 instead of DC 15, which is reduced to DC 5 if another creature uses a particularly appropriate action to help.

Shaggy Hardriggan.name: 蓬乱的哈德里根 Shaggy Hardriggan
Shaggy Hardriggan.description:
你长着一层厚厚的蓬松毛皮，保护你免受高山积雪气候的侵袭。尽管靛蓝群岛并不存在这种气候，你的传承证明你的祖先是从别处来到靛蓝群岛的。你获得等同于你等级一半的寒冷抗力（最低为 1）。你将环境寒冷效果视为比实际程度低一级（极寒变为严寒，严寒变为剧寒，依此类推）。

You have a thick coat of shaggy fur that protects you from the snowy climates of high mountains. Although there are no such climates in the Indigo Isles, your heritage is proof that your ancestors arrived in the Indigo Isles from elsewhere. You gain cold resistance equal to half your level (minimum 1). You treat environmental cold effects as if they were one step less extreme (incredible cold becomes extreme, extreme cold becomes severe, and so on).

Hidebound Orpok.name: 顽固的奥尔波克 Hidebound Orpok
Hidebound Orpok.description:
有些奥波克以对奥波克根源的恭顺格外顽固而闻名，而你继承了这种固执，使你的意志始终由你掌控。你获得等同于你等级一半（最低1）的精神伤害抗力。你还获得对抗会使你被控制的效果的豁免检定+1环境加值。

Some orpoks are known to be particularly obstinate in their deference to orpok traditions, and you’ve inherited a stubbornness that keeps your will your own. You gain resistance to mental damage equal to half your level (minimum 1). You also gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against effects that would make you controlled.

Greased Orpok.name: 上油的奥波克 Greased Orpok
Greased Orpok.description:
你的皮肤会持续分泌一层薄而无味的油脂，使你难以被抓住。你不会将不需要你进行挤入的狭窄空间视为困难地形。此外，你在进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} 的检定时获得+1环境加值，并且你的强韧DC在抵抗被擒抱时获得+1环境加值。

Your skin constantly exudes a thin, odorless oil that makes you hard to grasp. You don’t treat tight spaces that don’t require you to Squeeze as difficult terrain. In addition, you get a +1 circumstance bonus to checks made to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} and to your Fortitude DC to resist being Grappled.

Galtzagorri.name: 加尔察戈里 Galtzagorri
Galtzagorri.description:
你拥有瓢虫般的翅膀，并执着地让自己忙于制造与修补各种东西，比起无所事事、懒散度日，你宁愿接受任何命运。你在制造上为受训，若你已在制造上为受训，则改为选择你自选的另一项技能成为受训。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xWY5omyIcILNR7y1]{魔法制造} 专长，即使你不满足等级先决条件，或“不具备制造专家”这一先决条件。

You have ladybug-like wings and obsessively keep yourself busy crafting and tinkering with things, preferring any fate to being listless and idle. You are trained in Crafting, or another skill of your choice if you were already trained in Crafting. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.xWY5omyIcILNR7y1]{Magical Crafting} feat, even though you don't meet the level prerequisite or the prerequisite of being an expert in Crafting.

Stout Orpok.name: 矮壮的奥波克 Stout Orpok
Stout Orpok.description:
你出身于悠久的劳工、旅行者或其他兽人血统者的家族，他们依靠自己的坚韧与决心求得生存。在你变为负重状态前可携带的负载上限增加2负载（通常会将该上限从5 + 你的力量调整值提高到7 + 你的力量调整值），并将你能持有或携带的总负载上限增加4负载（通常会将该上限从10 + 你的力量调整值提高到14 + 你的力量调整值）。在探索时，你在必须停下之前可以疾行的时间延长为原来的两倍。

You come from a long line of laborers, travelers, or other orpoks who relied on their durability and determination to survive. Add 2 Bulk to the amount you can carry before becoming encumbered (normally, this increases this amount from 5 + your Strength modifier to 7 + your Strength modifier) and add 4 Bulk to the total amount you can hold or carry (normally, this increases this amount from 10 + your Strength modifier to 14 + your Strength modifier). When exploring, you can Hustle twice as long before you must stop.

Heme Bacco.name: 血红素·巴科 Heme Bacco
Heme Bacco.description:
你的头部与身体类似吸血蝙蝠，手臂上垂着几片皮肤褶皱，作为无法飞行的退化翅膀。你可能在夜间感觉更自在，这能帮助你在探索时保持隐蔽，并让你对其他巴科欧的社群格外依恋。只要你还能行动，你就能用这些皮肤褶皱减缓任何坠落，因此你不会受到坠落伤害，并且无论坠落距离多远，你总是双脚着地。

Your head and body resemble a vampire bat, and flaps of skin hang off your arms as vestigial wings incapable of flight. You may feel more comfortable at night, which helps you stay hidden when exploring and be particularly attached to communities of other bacoo. As long as you can act, you can use your skin flaps to slow any fall, so you don't take falling damage and always land on your feet, regardless of the distance of the fall.

Boulder Kragrak.name: 巨岩克拉格拉克 Boulder Kragrak
Boulder Kragrak.description:
巨石克拉格拉克格外强韧且极难被移动，不过它们沉重的形态并不适合快速移动。你在抵抗试图对你进行 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{绊摔} 的强韧或反射DC时，获得+2环境加值。该加值同样适用于对试图将你击倒为 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{倒地} 的法术或效果的豁免。若任何效果将迫使你移动10尺或更多，你只会移动一半距离。你还获得 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.AmP0qu7c5dlBSath]{坚韧} 专长作为奖励专长。然而，你的速度从25尺降低至20尺。

Boulder kragraks are particularly sturdy and extremely difficult to move, though their weighty forms do not lend themselves to rapid movement. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus to your Fortitude or Reflex DC against attempts to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{Shove} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{Trip} you. This bonus also applies to saving throws against spells or effects that attempt to knock you @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If any effect would force you to move 10 feet or more, you are moved only half the distance. You also gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.AmP0qu7c5dlBSath]{Toughness} feat as a bonus feat. However, your Speed decreases from 25 to 20 feet.

Fifth-of-Five, the Strangler.name: 五分之五，绞杀者 Fifth-of-Five, the Strangler
Fifth-of-Five, the Strangler.description:
你宣称与五分之一·五、众指者、沼泽之物、终末吐息有亲缘关系。你的触须状须鬃对水中的变化异常敏感，而你那修长、多关节的手指比看起来要强壮得多。你获得不精确的波感官，射程为30英尺，使你能够感知周围水中的运动；并且你用双手@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{擒抱}敌人时，进行运动检定获得+1环境加值。

You claim kinship to the Fifth-of-Five, the Many- Fingered-One, the Bog-Thing, the Last Breath. Your whiskery barbels are unusually sensitive to changes in the water, and your long, many-jointed fingers are far stronger than they look. You gain imprecise wavesense with a range of 30 feet, allowing you to sense motion in the water around you, and you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Athletics checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.PMbdMWc2QroouFGD]{Grapple} foes with your hands.

Vigilant Bannog.name: 警醒的班诺格 Vigilant Bannog
Vigilant Bannog.description:
你高度警觉，始终保持对危险与接近的敌人的警戒。每当你使用 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} 动作来定位一名 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} 的生物，或一处危害时，你的察觉检定获得 +1 环境加值；此外，对于试图 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}、@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak} 或 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice} 的生物，你的察觉 DC 也获得该加值。

You're hyper-alert and always remain on the lookout for danger and approaching foes. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your Perception checks whenever you use the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{Seek} action to locate an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected} or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden} creature or a hazard, as well as your Perception DC against creatures attempting to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.XMcnh4cSI32tljXa]{Hide}, @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneak}, or @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.IE2nThCmoyhQA0Jn]{Avoid Notice}.

Sand Kragrak.name: 沙·克拉格拉克 Sand Kragrak
Sand Kragrak.description:
无论你与翻涌海岸的沙滩有关联，还是与沙漠中不断变幻的沙丘有关联，你都明白命运潮起潮落，并擅长把握机会。你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.kZ0uYR0XDCcCSqAc]{Cycle of Tides and Dunes}反应动作。

Whether you are associated with the sands of churning coasts or the ever-shifting sand dunes of a desert, you understand that fortunes ebb and flow, and are skilled at seizing opportunities. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.kZ0uYR0XDCcCSqAc]{Cycle of Tides and Dunes} reaction.

Rhizo Bacco.name: 里佐·巴科 Rhizo Bacco
Rhizo Bacco.description:
你拥有类人生物的形态，但你的身体部分由红树林木材构成。你可能富有同理心，或对活生物彼此之间如何相互连接感兴趣。你获得@UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.X7ouXawdlDERfSAT]{向植物学习}行动。

You have a humanoid form, but parts of your body are made of mangrove wood. You may be highly empathetic or interested in how living creatures are connected to each other. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.X7ouXawdlDERfSAT]{Learn From Plant} activity.

Tusked Orpok.name: 长牙奥波克 Tusked Orpok
Tusked Orpok.description:
你的獠牙比其他奥尔波克更厚实、更锋利。与大多数奥尔波克不同，你的獠牙足够坚固，能够在战斗中作为徒手攻击使用。许多长獠牙的奥尔波克认为自己是神秘的奥尔波克先驱的后裔——这些先驱在200年前大型奥尔波克舰队抵达之前，曾居住在靛蓝群岛的隐秘之地。无论你是否相信这些传奇，你都拥有一种獠牙徒手攻击，可造成1d6穿刺伤害。你的獠牙属于斗殴武器组，并具有推撞、徒手以及多用 S特征。

Your tusks are thicker and sharper than those of other orpoks. Unlike most orpoks, your tusks are sufficiently sturdy to use as an unarmed attack in combat. Many tusked orpoks consider themselves to be descendants of the mysterious orpok forerunners who inhabited secret places in the Indigo Isles before the arrival of the large orpok fleet 200 years ago. Regardless of your belief in these legends, you have a tusk unarmed attack that deals 1d6 piercing damage. Your tusk is in the brawling weapon group and has the shove, unarmed, and versatile S traits.

Tastemaster Orpok.name: 品鉴大师奥尔波克 Tastemaster Orpok
Tastemaster Orpok.description:
即使在奥波克之中，你的味觉与嗅觉也异常敏锐，使你能够辨别气味与风味中的细微差别，即便其他奥波克也可能忽略。这有助于保护你免于食用或吸入危险的毒素。你获得@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.1Eceqc6zbMj2x0q9]{Seasoned}技能专长，即使你不满足该专长的先决条件；并且对抗吸入或摄入效果（例如某些毒素）以及嗅觉效果的豁免获得+1环境加值。

Your sense of taste and smell are keen even among orpoks, allowing you to identify subtleties in aromas and flavors that even other orpoks might miss. This helps protect you from eating or breathing in dangerous toxins. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.feats-srd.Item.1Eceqc6zbMj2x0q9]{Seasoned} skill feat, even if you don’t meet the feat’s prerequisites, and a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against inhaled or ingested effects (such as some poisons) and olfactory effects.

Salt Kragrak.name: 盐·克拉格拉克 Salt Kragrak
Salt Kragrak.description:
你体内的盐分会自然净化身心的污染物，包括物理与魔法污染。你对抗诅咒、疾病与怨灵的豁免获得+1环境加值。若你在对抗诅咒、疾病或怨灵的豁免中掷骰获得成功，则改为大成功。

The salt in your body naturally purifies both physical and magical contaminants. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against curses, diseases, and haunts. If you roll a success on a saving throw against curses, diseases, or haunts, you get a critical success instead.

Meleagris G'Mayun.name: 梅莱亚格里斯·吉梅云 Meleagris G'Mayun
Meleagris G'Mayun.description:
虽然大多数g’mayun看起来像鹦鹉或其他热带鸟类，但meleagris g’mayun像火鸡一样有肉垂、肉瘤、喉垂和胡须，还有一簇扇形的尾巴羽毛。很久以前，靛蓝群岛的大多数meleagris g’mayun以零星的小群体形式定居在蓝铃岛。两百年以前，当最早乘船抵达并建立海景镇的orpok到来时，当地的meleagris g’mayun运用他们的力量为其提供食物与救济，因此海景镇的人们将他们与“登陆日”节庆联系在一起，并倾向于在节庆中给予当地的meleagris g’mayun尊重与关键的角色。

像火鸡一样，你有肉垂、肉瘤、喉垂和胡须，还有一簇扇形的尾巴羽毛。无论你与伟大之歌的连结是否不同于其他g’mayun，或你是否受到春之女神奇拉的祝福，无论哪种情况，你都能凭空变出一种酸味的红色莓果酱汁，它可以滋养并疗愈。你获得 @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.TH1zF9VJBEYcBVf1]{Bring Out The Sauce!} 动作。

While most g’mayun look like parrots or other tropical birds, meleagris g’mayuns have snoods, caruncles, wattles and beards like a turkey, as well as a fan of tail feathers. Most meleagris g’mayuns in the Indigo Isles settled on Bluebell Island long ago in sporadic groups. Two hundred years ago, the local meleagris g’mayuns used their powers to provide sustenance and succor to the orpok who first arrived on their ships to found Seaview, and so the people of Seaview associate them with their festival of Landfall Day and tend to give local meleagris g’mayuns respect and key roles to play in the festival.

Like a turkey, you have a snood, caruncle, wattle and beard, as well as a fan of tail feathers. Whether your connection to the Great Song is different than other g’mayun or you are blessed by Chira, the goddess of spring, either way, you can conjure up a sour red berry sauce that can nourish and heal. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.battlezoo-world-of-indigo-isles-pf2e.indigo-isles-actions.Item.TH1zF9VJBEYcBVf1]{Bring Out The Sauce!} action.

Sixth-of-Five, the Mystery.name: 五分之六，谜团 Sixth-of-Five, the Mystery
Sixth-of-Five, the Mystery.description:
你来自……嗯，其实，没有人能完全确定。传说守护者和长老们都彻底困惑，不过有些人低声说你的血脉可能曾被寂静之声所触及。无论如何，从秘法列表中选择一个常见戏法，或选择另一个你拥有许可的秘法戏法。你可以将该戏法作为一个秘法天生法术来施放。与通常一样，戏法会自动升阶至你等级的一半（向上取整）。

You come from… well, actually, no one is entirely sure. The lorekeepers and elders are thoroughly confused, though a few whisper that your blood might have been touched by the Silent Voice. In any case, choose a common cantrip from the occult list or another occult cantrip to which you have access. You can cast that cantrip as an occult innate spell. As normal, cantrips are automatically heightened to half your level, rounded up.

Long-Tooth Bannog.name: 长牙班诺格 Long-Tooth Bannog
Long-Tooth Bannog.description:
你那过于巨大的门牙令人噩梦般不寒而栗。你获得一个颌骨徒手攻击，造成1d6穿刺伤害。你的颌骨属于斗殴组，并具有灵巧与徒手特性。

Your overly large incisors are a nightmare to behold. You gain a jaws unarmed attack that deals 1d6 piercing damage. Your jaws are in the brawling group and have the finesse and unarmed traits.

Wavespeaker Chochori.name: 浪语者乔科乔里 Wavespeaker Chochori
Wavespeaker Chochori.description:
当你对周围的波浪说话时，几乎感觉它们也能回应你，警告你附近各种正在移动的生物和物体。你获得不精确的波浪感官，射程为30英尺，使你能够感知周围水中的运动。你还获得+2环境加值，用于在你的波浪感官射程内定位在水下移动的未侦测生物。

When you speak to the waves around you, it almost feels like they can speak back to you, warning you of all sorts of nearby creatures and objects in motion. You gain imprecise wavesense with a range of 30 feet, allowing you to sense motion in the water around you. You also gain a +2 circumstance bonus to locate undetected creatures in motion underwater within the range of your wavesense.

Third-of-Five, the Hungry.name: 五中第三者，饥饿者 Third-of-Five, the Hungry
Third-of-Five, the Hungry.description:
你的血脉源自“五分之三”、 “千喉”、 “未盈之口”、 “噬海者”。你的嘴异常宽大，能够卸下颌关节；你还拥有一条又长又黏的舌头，能猛然弹出并钩住附近的猎物。你可以用舌头施放射程为接触的法术，并执行极其简单的交互动作，例如打开某些类型的未上锁门。你的舌头无法执行需要手指或显著手部敏捷的动作，包括任何需要通过检定才能完成的动作，而且你不能用它来握持物品。

Your blood comes from the Third-of-Five, the Thousand-Gullet, the Unfilled Maw, the Eater of Oceans. You have an unusually wide mouth and can unhinge your jaw, and you have a long, sticky tongue that can snap out and snag nearby prey. You can use your tongue to deliver touch-range spells and perform extremely simple Interact actions, such as opening some types of unlocked doors. Your tongue can't perform actions that require fingers or significant manual dexterity, including any action that would require a check to accomplish, and you can't use it to hold items.

Bounding Bannog.name: 弹跳班诺格 Bounding Bannog
Bounding Bannog.description:
你拥有强壮的腿部肌肉，能以加速的速度推动你前进。你的速度从25尺提升至30尺。

You have powerful leg muscles that propel you at accelerated speeds. Your Speed increases from 25 feet to 30 feet.

Eldheart Chochori.name: 艾德哈特·乔科里 Eldheart Chochori
Eldheart Chochori.description:
你与自身chora所关联的元素之间有着比一般chochori更深的联结，有人甚至说你可能受到了Eld的祝福。你在对抗带有与你chora之元素相匹配A:特征的效果时，所有豁免获得+2环境加值（aikrys对应气（特征），carbor对应植物（特征），farose对应火焰（特征），hypisk对应水（特征），jamambri对应电击（特征），terath对应土（特征），或vergiss对应寒冷（特征））。你在对抗具有该A:特征的生物时，进行@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{留下印象}的交涉检定与察觉检定也都获得+2环境加值。若你的chora在一次重大的生命转折中于之后发生改变，你获得的增益也会随之改变，以匹配你的新chora。

You have a deeper connection to the element associated with your chora than is normal for a chochori, and some say you might even be blessed by the Eld. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus on all saving throws against effects with the trait matching your chora's element (the air trait for aikrys, the plant trait for carbor, the fire trait for farose, the water trait for hypisk, the electricity trait for jamambri, the earth trait for terath, or the cold trait for vergiss). You also gain a +2 circumstance bonus on Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} against creatures with that trait and to Perception checks against creatures with that trait. If your chora later changes during a major life transition, your benefits change to match your new chora.

Tendrilweaver Chochori.name: 卷须编织者乔科里 Tendrilweaver Chochori
Tendrilweaver Chochori.description:
你的身体上长出了细小的触手，可以向你的对手注入一种温和、起效迅速的毒液。这些触手非常微小，不足以造成物理伤害，也无法移动或抓握任何东西。你获得一个触手徒手攻击，造成1d4毒素伤害。你的触手属于徒手武器组，并具有灵巧、娴熟和徒手特征。

You have tiny tentacles growing out of your body that can deliver a mild, fast-acting venom to your opponents. These many tentacles are extremely small, and they aren’t substantial enough to cause physical damage or to move or hold anything. You gain a tentacle unarmed attack that deals 1d4 poison damage. Your tentacle is in the brawling weapon group and has the agile, finesse, and unarmed traits.

Songtouched G'Mayun.name: 歌触·吉玛云 Songtouched G'Mayun
Songtouched G'Mayun.description:
伟大之歌以一种相较于其他g’mayuns更为特殊的方式在你体内流淌，赋予你绝对音感与对音乐的天生理解，以及对伟大之歌本身流动的领悟。你在用于歌唱或演奏乐器的表演检定上获得+1环境加值；若你在表演上为大师，则改为获得+2环境加值。此外，你对抗那些特别依赖音乐的听觉效果（例如鹰身女妖的歌声）的豁免获得+1环境加值。

The great song flows through you in a special way compared to other g’mayuns, granting you perfect pitch and an innate understanding of music, as well as the flow of the great song itself. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus on Performance checks to sing or play a musical instrument; if you are a master in Performance, you gain a +2 circumstance bonus instead. Additionally, you gain a +1 circumstance bonus to saving throws against auditory effects that rely specifically on music, such as a harpy’s song.
